subject: fix(cleanup): address 4 issues found during branch verification
body:
1. SaveLoadModal.jsx: Add aria-label to design list items with
   role="button" — screen readers couldn't announce purpose.

2. ReaderMode.jsx: Add aria-label="Back to Editor" on back button —
   mobile renders icon-only (text hidden via sm:inline).

3. MediaTab.jsx: Remove unused FULLBLEED_STRUCTURE import — only
   normalizeStructure is needed after deduplication refactor.

4. ContextBar.jsx: Same unused FULLBLEED_STRUCTURE import removal.

5. useAdState.js: Fix stale comment on TEXT_ELEMENT_IDS — was "used
   only in legacy migration" but now also used in applyStylePreset
   for look text styles.

Tags: cleanup, a11y, unused-imports, stale-comments
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
